content.thinking: Let me start by exploring the current state of the Kubernetes environment to understand what's deployed and what issues exist.

content.text: I'll start by surveying the current state of the Kubernetes environment.

input.command: kubectl get all -n spark-ops 2>/dev/null || kubectl get all --all-namespaces 2>/dev/null | head -60
input.description: Get all resources in spark-ops namespace or all namespaces

content.content:

default              Active   17d

kube-public          Active   17d
kube-system          Active   17d

spark-history        Active   11m
spark-runtime        Active   32m
spark-skew           Active   24m
spark-streaming      Active   29m

spark-team-b         Active   11m

input.command:
for ns in spark-etl spark-history spark-runtime spark-skew spark-streaming spark-team-a spark-team-b; do
  echo "=== Namespace: $ns ==="
  kubectl get all -n $ns 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
done
